title: Bandwidth Message
description: Represents an SMS or MMS message sent or received through the Bandwidth Messaging API, including delivery status, media attachments, and routing metadata.

id.description: The unique identifier for the message, assigned by Bandwidth

owner.description: The Bandwidth phone number that owns the message

applicationId.description: The Bandwidth application ID associated with the message

from.description: The source phone number in E.164 format

to.description: Array of destination phone numbers in E.164 format

text.description: The text content of the message

media.description: Array of media URLs for MMS attachments

direction.description: The direction of the message (in for received, out for sent)

segmentCount.description: The number of segments the message was split into for delivery

time.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was created

tag.description: A custom string attached to the message for tracking

priority.description: The priority level of the message

expiration.description: The expiration time after which undelivered messages are discarded

MessageDeliveryEvent.description: A webhook event for message delivery status updates

description.description: A human-readable description of the event

errorCode.description: The Bandwidth error code for failed messages

message.description: The message associated with this event

Media.description: A media file stored in Bandwidth for MMS messaging

mediaName.description: The name of the media file

contentLength.description: The size of the media file in bytes (max 3.75 MB)

contentType.description: The MIME type of the media file
